articles.title: Show HN: OSS Agent I built topped the TerminalBench on Gemini-3-flash-preview
articles.description: Scored 65.2% vs google's official 47.8%, and the existing top closed source model Junie CLI's 64.3%. Since there are a lot of reports of deliberate cheating on TerminalBench 2.0 lately ( https://debugml.github.io/cheating-agents/ ), I would like to also clarify a few things 1. Absolutely no {agents/skills}.md files were inserted at any point. No cheating mechanisms whatsoever 2. The cli agent was run in leaderboard compliant way (no modification of resources or timeouts) 3. The full terminal bench run was done using the fully open source version of the agent, no difference between what is on g

articles.title: Show HN: A terminal spreadsheet editor with Vim keybindings
articles.description: While speccing out this spreadsheet tool, I realized that I never had to think about the keybindings. It all just came naturally from Vim. Normal/insert/visual modes, hjkl navigation, dd/yy/p, :w, :q. The usual muscle memory works. It supports CSV/TSV import and export, and a native .cell format that preserves formulas. The formula engine handles SUM, AVERAGE, COUNT, MIN, MAX, and IF with range references. The codebase is a Cargo workspace: a pure cell-sheet-core library (no TUI dependency) and a cell-sheet-tui crate on top of ratatui. Early days, but it's usable. To try it out: cargo install

tech.summary:
🔬 今日科技动态摘要

1. **AI应用争议与伦理问题**：Canva因AI工具将“Palestine”替换为其他内容而道歉，凸显AI在敏感话题处理上的风险；同时，AI设计的汽车正在成型，显示AI在工业设计领域的深入应用。

2. **科技巨头内容与生态扩张**：亚马逊收购奥普拉·温弗瑞的播客，Spotify与Peloton合作推出健身指导内容，反映平台通过独家内容与跨界合作争夺用户注意力。

3. **消费电子创新与设计趋势**：Govee推出可作低分辨率屏幕的多彩吸顶灯；三星疑似研发新型宽幅折叠手机；谷歌渐变图标设计扩展至更多应用，体现产品形态与界面风格的多样化探索。

4. **科学政策与环境警示**：特朗普政府解雇国家科学委员会全体22名成员，引发对科研独立性的担忧；研究指出下一次厄尔尼诺可能成为气候变暖的临界点，强调环境风险加剧。

5. **产品安全与用户信任问题**：UL安全认证标志的复杂性被揭示；某网关制造商承认问题却回避“腐蚀”关键词，反映科技产品安全透明度与消费者信任的挑战。

**今日最值得关注的发展**：AI在内容生成与工业设计中的快速渗透，伴随伦理与安全争议，正成为科技行业必须直面的核心议题。

ai.summary:
🔬 今日AI动态摘要

1. **AI与硬件深度融合加速**：Claude推出首款AI桌宠硬件（深圳制造），京东JoyInside打造AI硬件“超级基础设施”，以及坦克700等汽车品牌引入AI概念，显示AI正从软件向实体硬件产品快速渗透。

2. **AI赋能内容与创意产业**：芒果传媒与爱诗科技合作，将全栈AI视频能力接入芒果内容生态；同时，让孩子画作动起来、用AI识别万物等应用涌现，AI正成为内容创作和互动体验的核心驱动力。

3. **AI工具落地实用化趋势明显**：从“打工人五一自救指南”中AI代劳工作，到OpenAI推出隐私过滤器助力构建可扩展应用，AI正从炫技走向解决实际生活与工作痛点，强调易用性与隐私保护。

4. **AI技术竞争聚焦3D与视觉能力**：李飞飞引爆的3D新技术引发关注，深圳公司早已布局；Meshy用户破千万后ARR年翻14倍，头部厂商集体买单，表明3D生成与视觉AI成为新战场。

5. **自动驾驶与整车智能成展会焦点**：地平线携整车智能全品类产品亮相北京车展，岚图等车企发布AI赋能新车，AI在汽车领域的应用已从单一功能向整车智能生态扩展。

**今日最值得关注的发展**：AI正从软件工具全面走向硬件、内容、3D视觉与汽车智能的深度融合，实用化与产业化进程明显提速。

articles.description: The Supreme People's Procuratorate (SPP) of China announced on Monday that it has started investigation into Sun Zhengcai, former secretary of Chongqing Municipal Committee of the Communist Party of China (CPC).

articles.title: Xi stresses nonstop efforts to fight undesirable work styles
articles.description: Xi Jinping, general secretary of the Communist Party of China Central Committee, stressed that the fight against undesirable work styles should not be stopped.

articles.title: World's largest automated container terminal starts operation in Shanghai
articles.description: As part of the Shanghai Free Trade Zone, the system can operate completely unmanned.

articles.title: China launches communication satellite for Algeria
articles.description: China launched Algeria's first communication satellite, Alcomsat-1, into a preset orbit from the Xichang Satellite Launch Center in the southwestern province of Sichuan early Monday.

articles.title: Chinese, Algerian presidents hail successful launch of communications satellite
articles.description: President Xi Jinping and his Algerian counterpart Abdelaziz Bouteflika exchanged congratulatory messages on the successful launch of Alcomsat-1 in the Xichang Satellite Launch Center in China's southwestern province of Sichuan early Monday.

articles.title: Autopsy: Jiang suffered several injuries before the fatal stab
articles.description: The trial of the alleged murderer of Chinese student Jiang Ge began at 10 am on Monday in Tokyo. It will last seven days and the verdict is expected on Dec 20.

articles.title: Asia's tallest wooden pagoda destroyed
articles.description: The 16-story structure was said to be the tallest wooden pagoda in Asia. No casualties were reported in the incident. The cause of the blaze is under investigation.

articles.title: Guizhou: Western province looks to the future of big data
articles.description: While located in the remote southwestern part of China, Guizhou leads the development of Big Data technology in recent years.

cctv.summary:
🔬 今日新闻联播动态摘要

1. **民生与公共服务改革**：教育、医疗等收费问题成为社会关注焦点，同时北京煤改气工程获亚投行2.5亿美元贷款，体现民生与环保并重的政策导向。
2. **中俄战略协作与国防技术转化**：中俄举行潜在导弹战争联合演习，同时中国推动更多军事技术向民用领域转化，以促进经济发展。
3. **生态治理与就业协同**：南水北调工程带动环境改善并创造本地就业；国际组织赞扬中国绿色复兴成效；云南香格里拉生态旅游成为区域发展亮点。
4. **反腐败与作风建设持续推进**：重庆原政治官员涉腐被调查；习近平强调“拔除不良工作作风”，显示从严治党力度不减。
5. **两岸关系与外交新动向**：台湾新党承诺推动改善两岸关系；中国为阿拉伯国家发射首颗卫星；习近平外交风格推动中国与世界更紧密联系。

**今日最值得关注的发展**：中俄联合导弹演习与军事技术民用化并举，凸显中国在安全与经济发展上的双重战略布局。
